prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model. Historical daily log returns for KO over the past 2 years were used to estimate the mean daily drift (mu=0.000109) and daily volatility (sigma=0.009028). These parameters were then scaled for a 20-day period to calculate the point estimate (mean of the log-normal distribution) and the specified confidence intervals.
